BIO:  from Ancestral Roots of Certain American Colonists Who Came to America before 1700, 8th Edition, 189:2-3

Sir John de Muscegros, of Charlton married Cecily Avenal, daughter of Sir William Avenal …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Muscegros於1232年8月10日出生在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福時，他的父親Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight25歲，母親Hawise Malet29歲。他於大約1251年與Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1275年5月8日之前在英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福，埋葬在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Muscegros was born on 10 August 1232, in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, his father, Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight, was 25 and his mother, Hawise Malet, was 29. He married Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor about 1251, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 8 May 1275, in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Muscegros est né le 10 août 1232, à Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Hawise Malet, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor environ 1251, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 8 mai 1275, à Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.Charlton Musgrove, Wincanton, Somerset,: Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John de Muscegros am 10. August 1232 in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight 25 und seine Mutter Hawise Malet 29. Er hat um 1251 in England, United Kingdom Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 8. Mai 1275 in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Muscegros è nato il il 10 agosto 1232 nel Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Hawise Malet, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor circa 1251, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 8 maggio 1275, nel Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Muscegrosが1232年8月10日にイギリスソメルセトチャールトン ムスグローブで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knightは25歳，母Hawise Maletは29歳であった。約1251年にイギリスイギリスでLady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1275年5月8日以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャールトン ムスグローブで死去し，イギリスソメルセトチャールトン ムスグローブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Muscegros(이)가 1232년 8월 10일 영국 서머세트 찰턴 무스그로브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Malet(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1251년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1275년 5월 8일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰턴 무스그로브에서 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 찰턴 무스그로브에 묻혔다.

pt.Charlton Musgrove, Wincanton, Somerset,: Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Muscegros nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1232, em Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Malet, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor aproximadamente 1251, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu antes 8 de maio de 1275, em Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Muscegros родился 10 августа 1232 г. в местности чарлтон мусгров, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Malet, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor около 1251 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 8 май 1275 г. в местности чарлтон мусгров, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности чарлтон мусгров, сомирсет, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor aproximadamente 1251, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió antes de 8 de mayo de 1275, en Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra.
